summary: Two combined work items. Work Item A (publish LAW-NTS-LANE-3_v1.md) DEFERRED — source content not in conversation/repo/memory/git. Work Item B (QOT bridge locate + audit) FULL SHIP — verdict bridge_present=NO with 10-section deliverable.

work_item_b.key_finding: Two parallel implementations of QOT concept across two Supabase projects. UZG+ qot_nodes (tree-shaped, content-node domain) and AIER Code qot_lineage (sequence-shaped, BLOCH-event domain) share name-prefix only. No connector exists; no bridge service found across 5 repos.
work_item_b.schema_match_summary: DIFFERENT tables: tree vs sequence shape, uuid vs bigserial PK, content vs event domain, no FK overlap.
